title: Malfunctioning interaction between a multi-term ORDER BY clause and UNIQUE index containing NULL values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value INTEGER, CONSTRAINT unique_name_value UNIQUE(name, value));
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Alice', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY name, value NULLS LAST;
key_bug_features: Multi-term ORDER BY with UNIQUE index and NULL values
